scripts.prisma:prepare: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const dir=p.join(process.cwd(),'node_modules','.prisma','client');if(!fs.existsSync(dir)){require('child_process').execSync('npx prisma generate',{stdio:'inherit'})}else{console.log('Prisma client already exists, skipping generation.')}"
scripts.build: npm run prisma:prepare && node -e "if(process.env.SKIP_DB_PUSH !== '1'){require('child_process').execSync('npm run prisma:push',{stdio:'inherit'})}" && node --check server.js && node --check lib/twitch.cjs && node --check lib/db.cjs && node --check lib/auth.cjs && node --check lib/admin-routes.cjs
